FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[OrderId], [m].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
INNER JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [t].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0 AND [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn'

SELECT [m].[Id], [m].[ArabicName], [m].[AttributeId], [m].[AttributePrice], [m].[BackColor], [m].[Barcode], [m].[BranchId], [m].[CategoryId], [m].[CreationDate], [m].[Description], [m].[EnglishName], [m].[FifthPrice], [m].[FourthPrice], [m].[HasAttribute], [m].[ImagePath], [m].[Invisible], [m].[KitchenTypeId], [m].[MainCategoryId], [m].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m].[Price], [m].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m].[SecondPrice], [m].[Tax], [m].[TextColor], [m].[TextSize], [m].[ThirdPrice], [m].[UpdatedDate], [c].[Id], [c].[ArabicName], [c].[BranchId], [c].[CreationDate], [c].[EnglishName], [c].[Invisible], [c].[ItemsFont], [c].[KitchenTypeId], [c].[NormalizedEnglishName], [c].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [c].[UpdateDate], [a].[Id], [a].[ArabicName], [a].[EnglishName], [t].[Id], [t].[AppearanceIndex], [t].[AttributeId], [t].[RelatedMenuItemId], [t].[Id0], [t].[ArabicName], [t].[AttributeId0], [t].[AttributePrice], [t].[BackColor], [t].[Barcode], [t].[BranchId], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[CreationDate], [t].[Description], [t].[EnglishName], [t].[FifthPrice], [t].[FourthPrice], [t].[HasAttribute], [t].[ImagePath], [t].[Invisible], [t].[KitchenTypeId], [t].[MainCategoryId], [t].[NormalizedEnglishName], [t].[Price], [t].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [t].[SecondPrice], [t].[Tax], [t].[TextColor], [t].[TextSize], [t].[ThirdPrice], [t].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [MenuSalesItems] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Attributes] AS [a] ON [m].[AttributeId] = [a].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[AppearanceIndex], [a0].[AttributeId], [a0].[RelatedMenuItemId], [m0].[Id] AS [Id0], [m0].[ArabicName], [m0].[AttributeId] AS [AttributeId0], [m0].[AttributePrice], [m0].[BackColor], [m0].[Barcode], [m0].[BranchId], [m0].[CategoryId], [m0].[CreationDate], [m0].[Description], [m0].[EnglishName], [m0].[FifthPrice], [m0].[FourthPrice], [m0].[HasAttribute], [m0].[ImagePath], [m0].[Invisible], [m0].[KitchenTypeId], [m0].[MainCategoryId], [m0].[NormalizedEnglishName], [m0].[Price], [m0].[PrintInBackupReceipt], [m0].[SecondPrice], [m0].[Tax], [m0].[TextColor], [m0].[TextSize], [m0].[ThirdPrice], [m0].[UpdatedDate]
    FROM [AttributeItems] AS [a0]
    INNER JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m0] ON [a0].[RelatedMenuItemId] = [m0].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [a].[Id] = [t].[AttributeId]
WHERE [m].[CategoryId] = @__catId_0

    LEFT JOIN [MenuSalesItems] AS [m] ON [o0].[MenuSalesItemId] = [m].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [m].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]

WHERE [o].[Id] = @__id_0 AND [o].[OrderType] = N'DineIn'

    FROM [AttributeItems] AS [a0]
